id: Halo! Aku siap bantu rekomendasiin film, musik, atau buku buat kamu 🎬🎵📚
Hai! Mau cari rekomendasi apa hari ini? Film, musik, atau buku?
Hei! Aku RecBot, siap kasih rekomendasi terbaik buat kamu!
en: Hey there! I can recommend movies, music, or books for you 🎬🎵📚
Hi! Looking for a movie, some music, or a good book?
Hello! I'm RecBot, ready to give you the best recommendations!

ask_type.id: Mau rekomendasi apa? 🎬 Film, 🎵 Musik, atau 📚 Buku?
ask_type.en: What would you like? 🎬 Movies, 🎵 Music, or 📚 Books?

recommend_movie.id: Nih beberapa film yang mungkin kamu suka 🎬
recommend_movie.en: Here are some movies you might enjoy 🎬

recommend_music.en: Check these out, you might love them! 🎵

recommend_book.id: Buku-buku ini kayaknya bakal kamu suka 📚
recommend_book.en: These books might be perfect for you 📚

ask_more.id: Oke, ini rekomendasi tambahan buat kamu!
ask_more.en: Sure! Here are more recommendations for you!

id: Sama-sama! Semoga rekomendasi tadi cocok ya 😊
Senang bisa bantu! Kalau butuh rekomendasi lagi, tanya aja!
en: You're welcome! Hope you enjoy the recommendations 😊
Happy to help! Feel free to ask for more anytime!
See you! Have a great time 😊

fallback.id: Hmm, aku kurang ngerti maksudnya. Coba tanya rekomendasi film, musik, atau buku ya!
fallback.en: Hmm, I'm not sure I understand. Try asking for a movie, music, or book recommendation!
